creator: michael.hmich@gmail.com
text:
(In reply to Alexey Dokuchaev from comment #1)

now the actual pkg is "still" working with the mentioned kernel versions as well as with former versions

but the actual ports driver-390 only works until 13-Release, not even with 13-p03, boot loader msg is kernel found but wrong version

other combinations hang up the machine at driver loading, while the 13-p03 gives me still a loader prompt with the ports version, works fine with the pkg version
